title: Authority to create sub-districts
doc_html:
§1753.  Authority to create sub-districts

In all cases where gravity drainage districts have been, or will be, organized by the action of a police jury, or the joint action of two or more police juries, the police jury may create gravity sub-drainage districts therein in the manner and on the conditions provided in this Part.
doc_text:
§1753.  Authority to create sub-districts
In all cases where gravity drainage districts have been, or will be, organized by the action of a police jury, or the joint action of two or more police juries, the police jury may create gravity sub-drainage districts therein in the manner and on the conditions provided in this Part.
